untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom put-call ratio calculation (put open-buy volume / (put open-buy volume + call open-buy volume)) and daily cross-sectional quintile sorting with extreme quintile assignments. These derived metrics and ranking operations are not available in the allowed indicator set. The 'volume' field used here is a placeholder and does not represent the actual put-call ratio logic required. This strategy requires a custom implementation at the portfolio construction level rather than individual position-level rules.
translation_notes: SSRN_622869_6 is a sophisticated factor-based strategy requiring: (1) custom option flow calculation not in allowed indicators, (2) daily cross-sectional ranking across entire stock universe, (3) quintile-based portfolio construction with long Q5 / short Q1 positions. The daily rebalance frequency (hold_days_max=1) is captured, but the core put-call ratio sorting mechanism cannot be expressed within the individual-stock rule framework. This signal requires portfolio-level implementation with option volume data feeds.
